prompt_identifiers.concept: So take a deep breath open your mind

metadata.original_prompt: So, take a deep breath, open your mind to the possibilities, and prepare to embark on an exhilarating adventure with Midjourney AI. Let your creativity soar as you explore the intersection of your personal artistic ability and artificial intelligence. Welcome to a world where the boundaries of imagination are limitless, and the journey is just beginning.
metadata.source_file: 100 Descriptive Prompts for Great Art When Using Midjourney AI Book 1 of the A.I. Prompts Series (Acedo, Steven) (z-library.sk, 1lib.sk, z-lib.sk).txt
